name: Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the peanut butter and mix well.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (cake flour, baking powder, and salt).
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the creamed mixture, mixing after each addition.
5. Stir in the beaten eggs until combined.
6. Grease and flour a pan, then pour in the batter.
7. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
8. Icing: Mix together 2 cups icing sugar, 2 tablespoons margarine, 1 tablespoon peanut butter, and enough hot water to make it spreadable.
